title: SecretUri: query params not URL-decoded
description: secretx-core/src/lib.rs SecretUri::parse() splits query parameters by '&' and '=' but does not percent-decode values. A field name with a space ('my field') must be encoded as 'my%20field' in the URI, but param('my field') returns None even though param('my%20field') would work. Trigger: any query parameter containing a special character (space, +, =, &, /) → value is silently returned encoded; comparison against unencoded string fails. Path segments have the same issue.
